name: Sebastian Krueger
description: Sebastian Krueger, an Austrian-born former KSK operative, is a ghost on the battlefield. Skilled in surveillance, evasion, and mercenary warfare, he hides behind his scrim hood and past sins. Haunted by accusations of civilian deaths he denies, he lives as both predator and fugitive. Cold, calculating, and enigmatic, Krueger moves through shadows, loyal only to survival and the few who prove worthy of his trust.
creator: Murphfins
